ideation: This animation sequence portrays Mrs. Claus in a warm and welcoming manner, using gentle, flowing arm movements that suggest kindness and generosity. The sequence begins with her arms relaxed at her sides, then moves to a gesture of offering, and finally returns to a resting position. I will ensure the movements are smooth, flowing, and natural-looking, consistent with the overall impression of the emoji.  The robot's lack of elbows will be addressed by using a combination of joint1 and joint2 to create the illusion of a graceful arm movement.

frames.beat: mrs. claus rests her arms gently at her sides
arms open wide in a warm, offering gesture
arms return to a soft, welcoming rest
